title: Randomly Random
content:
On a quiet day, I thought I should write more for breadcrumb or otherwise the trail might gone cold. But then I realized, I've nothing to write. I've been living a routine life - so routine that I recalled mentioning this more than 3 times on this blog already. :D

Maybe I need to travel more or travel more seriously so that I have things to write about. But then again, I still haven't finished writing about **my trip to Italy last year** yet.

So this is another post to push the previous one down. :P
